en: I go on too many dates, but I can't make them stay, at least that's what people say, mm-mm,
ko: 하지만 붙잡을 수 없어. 적어도 사람들은 그렇게 말해. 음음 그게

en: that's what people say, mm-mm, but I keep cruising, can't stop, won't stop moving,
ko: 사람들이 하는 말. 음음 하지만 난 계속 달려. 멈출 수 없어

en: it's like I got this music in my mind saying it's gonna be all right,
ko: 내 마음속에 음악이 있는 것 같아

en: cause the players gonna play, play, play, play, play, and my haters gonna hate, hate, hate, hate,
hate, baby, I'm just gonna shake, shake, shake, shake, shake, shake it off, shake it off,
ko: 베이비, 나는 그냥 흔들 거야, 흔들 거야, 흔들 거야

en: the heartbreakers gonna break, break, break, break, break, and the fakers gonna fake,
fake, fake, fake, fake, baby, I'm just gonna shake, shake, shake, shake, shake it off,
ko: 베이비, 나는 그냥 흔들 거야, 흔들 거야, 흔들 거야

en: shake it off, I never miss a beat, I'm lightning on my feet, and that's what they don't see,
ko: 박자를 놓치지 않아, 난 발이 번개처럼 빨라

en: that's what they don't see, mm-mm, I'm dancing on my own,
